verdict.summary: Guide is broadly useful but contains several misleading SNS-process claims, an incorrect 18-year “transition” concept, an inflated/unsupported children-without-family-doctor figure, and weak official sourcing for DGS schedules and urgent-care rules.

issues.current: В SNS каждому ребёнку по umute назначается **médico de família**
issues.problem: Misleading: children are registered as utentes, but assignment of a médico de família is not guaranteed in practice because many units have no list capacity. The guide later admits wait-lists, creating an internal contradiction. Also 'umute' is a typo for 'utente'.
issues.suggestion: Write: "После регистрации ребёнку присваивают Número de Utente; médico de família назначают, если в USF/UCSP есть свободные списки. Если места нет, ребёнок остаётся sem médico de família, но сохраняет доступ к вакцинации, Saúde Infantil через unidade/consulta aberta/enfermagem и urgent care."
issues.source: SNS / Registo Nacional de Utentes; ACSS/SNS public reporting on utentes sem médico de família

issues.current: Педиатры — узкие специалисты для сложных случаев.
issues.problem: Overstates the model. In Portugal, pediatrics is a hospital/specialty-care medical specialty and private pediatricians commonly provide routine child care; it is not accurate to describe pediatricians only as 'narrow specialists for complex cases'.
issues.suggestion: Write: "В SNS первичное наблюдение обычно ведёт médico de família/medicina geral e familiar и enfermeiro de família; pediatria в SNS обычно доступна через направление в hospital/specialty care. В частном секторе педиатры часто ведут и обычные профилактические консультации."
issues.source: Ordem dos Médicos — Colégio da Especialidade de Pediatria; SNS primary care model

issues.current: ⚠️ Если ваш центр здоровья без свободного doctor'ов — ставят в wait-list. В 2025 ~800 тыс детей в PT без family doctor
issues.problem: The '~800 thousand children' figure is very likely wrong/unsupported. Publicly discussed figures around 2024-2026 usually refer to total residents without a family doctor, not children only; child-specific figures are much lower and must be sourced if stated.
issues.suggestion: Either remove the number or write: "В Португалии остаётся значительное число utentes sem médico de família; актуальные цифры проверяйте в SNS/ACSS transparency reports. Не все дети получают médico de família сразу."
issues.source: SNS Transparência / ACSS data on utentes sem médico de família

issues.current: Бесплатно для utente, по graphику DGS: ... 1, 2, 4, 6, 9, 12 мес ... 13, 15, 18 лет
issues.problem: The DGS Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil schedule is imprecisely reproduced: it includes a consultation in the first week of life and uses age bands such as 6-7 years, 12-13 years, and 15-18 years rather than separate fixed visits at 13, 15, and 18 in the way written.
issues.suggestion: Use the DGS wording: "1.ª semana de vida; 1, 2, 4, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18 meses; 2, 3, 4, 5 anos; 6-7, 8, 10, 12-13 e 15-18 anos" and note that local scheduling may vary.
issues.source: DGS — Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil

issues.current: Документы: паспорт / CC ребёнка, NIF, NISS, свидетельство о рождении, atestado de residência
issues.problem: NISS is not normally a mandatory document for getting a Número de Utente. For foreign children, the required proof depends on status and local interpretation; residence permit/visa/manifestação/CRUE or proof of residence may be more relevant than NISS.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Обычно просят ID/passport or CC, birth certificate if needed, NIF if available, proof of address/residence status; NISS is useful but usually not a condition for Número de Utente. Requirements can vary by Centro de Saúde."
issues.source: SNS / SPMS — Número de Utente and Registo Nacional de Utentes guidance

issues.current: Направление от family doctor (через RRVE референсы) — бесплатно, но wait 2-6 мес
issues.problem: Wrong/confusing terminology. Referrals from primary care to hospital specialty consultations are generally handled through the SNS referral/access systems historically known as CTH and now integrated in SIGA SNS, not 'RRVE референсы'. Also '2-6 months' is too generic: waiting times vary by priority, specialty, hospital, and region.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Направление от médico de família через систему referenciação/SIGA SNS para consulta hospitalar; для детей без taxas moderadoras. Ожидание зависит от приоритета и hospital and can range from weeks to many months."
issues.source: ACSS/SNS — SIGA SNS and Consulta a Tempo e Horas

issues.problem: 'нейрогинек' appears to be a typo or nonexistent specialty label in this context. It likely means pediatric neurology. The term is confusing for readers.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "subspecialty consultation, e.g. neurologia pediátrica, cardiologia pediátrica, endocrinologia pediátrica: ~80-150 €".

issues.current: Обычно нет carência на педиатрию (immediately работает)
issues.problem: Potentially misleading. Many Portuguese health insurance plans apply waiting periods or exclusions for some pediatric-related acts, pre-existing conditions, hospitalization, exams, pregnancy/newborn inclusion, or higher tiers. Outpatient pediatric consultations may be immediate in some plans, but this is not universal.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Для simples consultas de pediatria carência часто отсутствует или короткая, но это зависит от apólice; проверяйте carências for exams, hospitalization, pre-existing conditions and newborn inclusion."
issues.source: Insurer policy conditions — Médis, Multicare, AdvanceCare

issues.problem: SNS 24 does not perform Manchester triage; Manchester Triage is used in emergency departments. SNS 24 uses telephone/clinical algorithms and may refer to self-care, primary care, emergency department, or INEM/112. Also for life-threatening symptoms the instruction should be 112, not SNS 24 first.
issues.suggestion: Write: "При угрозе жизни — 112. В неэкстренных/сомнительных случаях сначала звоните SNS 24: 808 24 24 24; оператор/медсестра проведёт телефонную triagem and tells where to go. Manchester triage happens after arrival at hospital emergency."
issues.source: SNS 24; INEM; Manchester Triage System in Portuguese emergency departments

issues.current: 🏥 **Lisboa**: Hospital Dona Estefânia — основной педиатрический, 24/7 ... 🏥 **Porto**: Hospital de São João, Centro Materno-Infantil do Norte ... Частные: CUF Tejo Pediatric, Luz Pediatric — меньше очередей
issues.problem: Urgency availability in Portugal changes frequently due to staffing constraints and reorganisation. Listing specific hospitals as simply '24/7' without telling readers to check the official open-services list can be unsafe. Private urgent care availability also varies by location and age.
issues.suggestion: Add: "Перед поездкой проверяйте serviços de urgência disponíveis on SNS/ULS pages or call SNS 24; pediatric emergency units may have temporary constraints. For private hospitals, confirm pediatric urgent-care hours and accepted ages before going."

issues.current: 🎂 **18 лет — переход на взрослого family doctor**: автоматически переводят; иногда нужно подать request
issues.problem: Incorrect concept. A médico de família is already a general/family medicine doctor for all ages, not a pediatrician. At 18 the person leaves the Saúde Infantil e Juvenil programme and becomes followed as an adult patient, but there is usually no automatic transfer to a different 'adult family doctor' unless changing unit/list.
issues.suggestion: Write: "После 18 лет заканчивается программа Saúde Infantil e Juvenil; тот же médico de família обычно продолжает наблюдение как взрослого utente. Отдельный transfer нужен только если меняете centro de saúde/lista или если ребёнок был followed mainly by pediatria."
issues.source: SNS primary care / Medicina Geral e Familiar model; DGS PNSIJ age scope

issues.current: 🌍 **Для наблюдения специалиста за рубежом**: certificate «S2 form» от SS — покрытие лечения в другой стране ЕС при обоснованной необходимости (редко одобряют)
issues.problem: Misleading authority and scope. The S2 form is for prior-authorised planned healthcare in another EU/EEA/Switzerland country, not general 'specialist follow-up abroad'. In Portugal it is a healthcare/SNS authorisation route, not simply a Segurança Social certificate issued on request.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Для planned treatment in another EU/EEA/Switzerland country may be possible through prior authorisation S2 from the competent Portuguese health authority/SNS route; it is not for ordinary private follow-up and must be approved before treatment. EHIC/CESD is different and covers necessary temporary-stay care."
issues.source: European Commission — S2 planned medical treatment; SNS/ACSS cross-border healthcare guidance

issues.current: 💊 **Рецепты**: электронные, действительны 6 мес для хронических; экономия ~50% в аптеке с SNS
issues.problem: Oversimplified. Prescription validity depends on prescription type/line and medicine. Reimbursement is not a flat ~50%; Portuguese comparticipação bands vary, commonly 90%, 69%, 37%, 15% or specific regimes, and many medicines are not reimbursed.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Электронные рецепты имеют разные сроки действия depending on medicine/prescription type; chronic medicines can be issued as renewable/longer-validity prescriptions. SNS reimbursement depends on medicine and regime, not a fixed 50%."
issues.source: INFARMED — comparticipação de medicamentos; SPMS e-prescription rules

issues.problem: Typo in the linked guide title ('Prвички') and no actual link. For vaccines this guide should point to the official PNV source, because schedules change.
issues.suggestion: Fix the title to "Прививки в Португалии" and add a link/source to the current DGS Programa Nacional de Vacinação page or Norma.

issues.current: DGS — Saúde Infantil e Juvenil / https://www.dgs.pt/
issues.problem: Too generic. The guide gives specific consultation ages, so the source should be the actual DGS Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil document/page, not the DGS homepage.
issues.suggestion: Replace or add a direct source: "DGS — Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil" with the direct DGS PDF/page URL.
issues.source: DGS — Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil

issues.problem: Too generic and not enough for claims about scheduling, SNS 24, urgent care, and app functionality.
issues.suggestion: Add direct sources for SNS 24 telephone triage, pediatric urgent-care access/open services, and the SNS app/Área Pessoal do SNS.
issues.source: SNS 24; SNS — Serviços de Urgência; SPMS — app SNS 24

missing_topics: Clear distinction between 112 emergencies and SNS 24 triage for non-life-threatening pediatric problems
Official way to check which pediatric emergency departments are open or constrained before travelling
What happens if a child has no médico de família: vaccination room, nurse consultations, consulta aberta/atendimento complementar, and how to book
Direct DGS sources for Programa Nacional de Saúde Infantil e Juvenil and Programa Nacional de Vacinação
Newborn-specific items: first-week consultation, teste do pezinho/rastreio neonatal, and how newborns born in Portugal get registered in SNS
Clarification that private insurance conditions vary: waiting periods, pre-existing conditions, newborn inclusion, exams and hospitalization limits
